title: Implement agent loop with schema enforcement and streaming
purpose: Implement the core agent loop — the function call that runs an agent step. This is the heart of Norn: take a provider, tools, context, instruction, and output schema, execute the prompt-tool cycle until the model produces schema-valid structured output or the budget is exhausted, streaming events throughout.
task: Implement the agent loop in the loop module. The loop sends a ProviderRequest to the provider, streams the response, assembles the complete response (text + tool calls as one assistant message), executes tool calls if present, and repeats until the model produces valid structured output via the dynamic schema tool or stops without tool calls. Schema enforcement uses a combined attempt budget covering both nudges and validation retries. The schema tool is terminal. The loop emits ProviderEvents for observability. All session events are appended to the EventStore. Testing: Layer 2 mock provider tests.

requirements.title: Define agent loop entry point
requirements.spec: The loop module SHALL define a ToolExecutor trait as its minimal tool dispatch interface: an async method that takes a tool name and arguments (Value) and returns a Result<Value, ToolError>. The loop module SHALL expose a public async function `run_agent_step` that accepts a shared provider, a &dyn ToolExecutor, EventStore, ContextEdits, instruction, optional output schema, and configuration. It SHALL return Result<AgentStepResult, NornError>. N-006 (ToolRegistry) will implement ToolExecutor.
acceptance: run_agent_step is a public async function in the loop module
AgentLoopConfig struct has fields: schema_attempt_budget (u32, default 3), max_iterations (Option<u32>), schema_tool_name (String, default 'structured_output')

AgentStepResult enum has variants: Completed { output: Value, usage: Usage }, SchemaUnreachable { best_attempt: Option<Value>, validation_errors: Vec<String>, attempts: u32, usage: Usage }, MaxIterationsReached { usage: Usage }
ToolExecutor trait defined in loop module: async fn execute(&self, name: &str, arguments: Value) -> Result<Value, ToolError>
ToolExecutor is object-safe (usable as &dyn ToolExecutor)
A MockToolExecutor (HashMap<String, closure>) is provided for testing
The function compiles and can be called with MockProvider and MockToolExecutor

requirements.title: Implement prompt-tool cycle
requirements.spec: The agent loop SHALL cycle: construct prompt, call provider, assemble response, append assistant message, execute tool calls if present, loop. Text and tool calls from one provider response are one assistant message.
acceptance: MockProvider test: two-turn interaction (tool call then text stop) verifies exactly 2 provider calls
After turn 1: EventStore has AssistantMessage (with tool call) and ToolResult
After turn 2: EventStore has second AssistantMessage (text only)
Text + tool calls from same response = single AssistantMessage event
Assistant message appended BEFORE tool calls execute

requirements.title: Implement response assembly from stream
requirements.spec: The loop SHALL assemble a complete response from ProviderEvents. TextDelta accumulated into text. ToolCallDelta accumulated into tool calls. Classification happens after Done, not during streaming.
acceptance: [TextDelta('hello '), TextDelta('world'), Done] -> text='hello world', 0 tool calls
[TextDelta('x'), ToolCallDelta(id=1,name='read',args='{"path":'), ToolCallDelta(id=1,args='"f"}'), Done(ToolUse)] -> text='x', 1 tool call with args='{"path":"f"}'
[ToolCallDelta(id=1,...), ToolCallDelta(id=2,...), Done] -> 2 tool calls
Classification does NOT happen during streaming

requirements.title: Implement response classification (four cases)
requirements.spec: After assembly, classify: (1) schema tool + valid = Completed, (2) schema tool + invalid = retry, (3) other tools only = execute + continue (no budget), (4) no tools + stopped = nudge + budget.
acceptance: Case 1: schema tool with valid output -> Completed
Case 2: schema tool invalid then valid -> Completed, EventStore has validation error between calls
Case 3: Read tool then schema tool -> Read executes, Completed. No budget consumed for Read
Case 4: text-only stop then schema tool after nudge -> nudge injected, Completed. 1 budget consumed
Schema tool identified by configurable name (default 'structured_output')

requirements.title: Schema tool is terminal action
requirements.spec: WHEN the model calls the schema tool, it is terminal. Other tools alongside it execute normally. Tools after it in response ordering are rejected.
acceptance: Test: [read_tool, schema_tool] in one response -> read executes (before schema tool), schema output extracted as result
Test: [schema_tool, read_tool] in one response -> read REJECTED (after schema tool), schema output extracted as result
Schema tool execute phase = JSON schema validation of arguments against output schema

requirements.title: Schema validation and retry feedback
requirements.spec: WHEN schema tool output fails validation, feed back errors as tool result with schema definition and specific failures. Consumes one budget attempt.
acceptance: Uses jsonschema crate for validation
Failure: ToolResult appended with validation errors, schema, and invalid output
Test: 2 invalid then 1 valid -> Completed, 2 budget consumed, 2 error feedback events in store

requirements.title: Combined budget and SchemaUnreachable
requirements.spec: Combined budget (default 3) covers nudges + validation retries. Budget exhaustion returns SchemaUnreachable. Loop SHALL NOT continue past exhaustion.
acceptance: 3 text-only stops -> SchemaUnreachable(attempts:3)
3 invalid schema calls -> SchemaUnreachable(best_attempt=last output, attempts:3)
1 nudge + 2 invalid -> SchemaUnreachable(attempts:3)
budget=1 + 1 stop -> SchemaUnreachable(attempts:1)
SchemaUnreachable.usage has accumulated tokens from all calls

requirements.title: Schema nudge injection
requirements.spec: WHEN model stops without schema tool, inject nudge with tool name, schema definition, and explicit instruction. Appended as UserMessage event.
acceptance: Nudge contains schema tool name
Nudge contains JSON schema definition
Nudge contains 'Call the structured_output tool with your result'
Nudge appended as UserMessage to EventStore
Test verifies all three nudge components present

requirements.title: Streaming event emission
requirements.spec: The loop SHALL forward ProviderEvents to an optional broadcast channel for observability.
acceptance: run_agent_step accepts optional event_tx: Option<broadcast::Sender<ProviderEvent>>
Every ProviderEvent forwarded to channel during streaming
No error if channel absent
Test: subscribe, run loop, verify events arrive in order

requirements.title: No-schema mode
requirements.spec: WHEN output_schema is None, run prompt-tool cycle without schema enforcement. Loop ends on model stop. Text returned as JSON string Value. No schema tool, no nudges, no budget.
acceptance: None schema + text stop -> Completed with text as JSON string
None schema + tool then text -> tools execute, text returned
No schema tool in ProviderRequest when output_schema is None
No nudge when output_schema is None

requirements.title: Add jsonschema and tokio dependencies
requirements.spec: Cargo.toml SHALL add jsonschema for validation and tokio with sync feature for broadcast.
acceptance: Cargo.toml includes jsonschema
Cargo.toml includes tokio with sync feature
cargo check -p norn succeeds

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement tool execution logic — dispatches to ToolRegistry (N-006). Mock tools for testing
SHALL NOT implement inbound channels or steering (C20-C22)
SHALL NOT implement token threshold detection or soft handoff (C23-C24)
SHALL NOT implement repeated failure detection or semantic quality signals (C25-C26)
SHALL NOT implement session persistence — in-memory per N-003
SHALL NOT set response_format — dynamic tool only
SHALL NOT implement tool lifecycle phases — loop dispatches to ToolRegistry
verification: cargo check -p norn succeeds with zero errors
cargo test -p norn — all loop tests pass with MockProvider
cargo clippy -p norn -- -D warnings zero errors
SchemaUnreachable tested: pure nudge, pure validation, mixed, budget=1/2/3
grep -rn 'unwrap()\|expect(' crates/norn/src/loop/ returns no matches outside tests
